summary: Completed testing of Settings page, Guide page, sidebar navigation, and APScheduler integration. All features working correctly.

minor.issue:
HTML nesting warning in console - Badge component inside

tag
minor.impact: Console warning only, no functional impact

passed_tests: Sidebar navigation has all 7 items: Dashboard, Kategoriler, Urunler, Fiyat Takip, SEO Uretici, Ayarlar, Rehber
Navigate to /settings - shows Ayarlar page with Sistem Durumu, Otomatik Zamanlayici (scheduler shows 'Aktif' badge, 2 scheduled jobs: Feed Sync 12 saat, Fiyat Kontrolu 24 saat), and API Anahtarlari
Navigate to /guide - shows Rehber page with system guide in 5 numbered steps
Navigate to /products - shows products table with 'Fiyat Kontrol' button for matched products and 'En Ucuz Rakip' column
GET /api/scheduler/status returns scheduler_running: true and 2 jobs (feed_sync, price_check_cron)
Header bar shows page title matching current page (Dashboard, Ayarlar, Rehber, Urunler)
Products filter tabs working (Tum Urunler, Aktif Kategoriler, Eslesmis, Eslesmemis)
GET /api/products returns products list with pagination

context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features for iteration 5 are working: Settings page with scheduler status (APScheduler with 12h feed sync and 24h price check jobs), Guide page with 5-step system guide, sidebar with all 7 navigation items, Products page with 'En Ucuz Rakip' column and 'Fiyat' button for matched products. Minor HTML nesting warning in console but no functional issues.
